item.title: tony_calvin: Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 8min NRs still coming through (Our Power the latest at Ayr , and Jimmy Speaking at Newbury) a
item.description: Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 8min NRs still coming through (Our Power the latest at Ayr , and Jimmy Speaking at Newbury) and I'll add them in when I see them. Cita Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 5h TODAY's statistics and info for Newbury and Ayr. Going, weather, watering (Ayr changed to soft, heavy in places during racing yesterday and 3mm+ due this morning, so expect more NRs - BHA site is wrong); 1st-time headgear stats, pace maps and trainerform; https:// tips.akbets.co.uk/tony-calvin-sa turday-stats-info/ … 194

Racing Post @RacingPost · 12min Racing Postcast with @UnibetRacing
@keithmelrose breaks down the Scotty Brand Handicap Chase at Ayr
Watch here: https:// youtu.be/l46gTjW7KrI
18+GambleResponsibly 4 853

item.title:
BenStarSports: Fitzwilliam reposteó Ben Keith @BenStarSports · 2h Quote of The Day:
"It's great just being on the bus."
Michael "Chip
item.description:
Fitzwilliam reposteó Ben Keith @BenStarSports · 2h Quote of The Day:
"It's great just being on the bus."
Michael "Chips" Gannon, @Fitzwilliam__ Cita Fitzwilliam @Fitzwilliam__ · 8 abr. Fitzwilliam are Aintree bound with @JohnnyDineen and Chips at the helm once more
We’ll see you in the ring, punters! 1 3 737

item.title: BetfairExchange: Betfair reposteó Betfair Exchange @BetfairExchange · 32min Olise to complete magical week Lille to continue excellent
item.description:
Betfair reposteó Betfair Exchange @BetfairExchange · 32min Olise to complete magical week Lille to continue excellent run Spanish showpiece to feature goals
@kevinhatchard 's latest De betting.betfair.com 1 2 664
